Related Entities

  • hospital JOHNSON CITY MEDICAL CENTER
  • hospital MOUNTAIN HOME VA MEDICAL CENTER 5-star overall rating
  • hospital FRANKLIN WOODS COMMUNITY HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • snf NHC HEALTHCARE, JOHNSON CITY 5-star, 167 beds
  • snf AGAPE REHABILITATION & NURSING CENTER, A WATERS CM 4-star, 84 beds
  • snf PRINCETON TRANSITIONAL CARE & ASSISTED LIVING 5-star, 47 beds
  • snf LAKEBRIDGE, A WATERS COMMUNITY, LLC 3-star, 109 beds
  • snf FOUR OAKS HEALTH CARE CENTER 3-star, 84 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF GRAY 1-star, 133 beds
  • snf ABUNDANT CHRISTIAN LIVING COMMUNITY REHABILITATION 5-star, 103 beds
  • snf THE WATERS OF JOHNSON CITY, LLC 2-star, 84 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
